reply.text: I bet you order one more drink and start trouble on purpose

messages.text: You say that like you could handle the trouble
Handle it and order dessert while im at it
Please, you would be crying before the check comes
id just blame the bill and order another round
Bold talk for someone not even at this table
im just letting you warm up the seat for me
This seat has standards, relax restaurant critic
You are loud, make it count
Clearance still gets the job done and leaves happy
You really selling yourself like a discount menu
im the secret item they dont print
Secret items usually give people regrets by midnight
You already planning damage control, that is wild
when are we doing drinks? text me 555 245 2505
Ok, when and where? text me 555 245 2505
